title: Enable bash completion in the CLI tool
body: This adds the shell snippets for adding autocompletion for the buildah, and enables the supporting logic in the tool itself.

comments.body: I think this gives a very partial completion.  Only the toplevel commands.
Darn, it looks like you're right.
Lets rely on https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/15 for a more complete solution, once we finalize on the CLI.
